description: Viewer for git and diff output.

option.name: --blame-code-style
tip: Style string for the code section of a git blame line.

option.name: --blame-format
tip: Format string for git blame commit metadata.

option.name: --blame-palette
tip: Background colors used for git blame lines (space-separated).

option.name: --blame-separator-format
tip: Separator between the blame format and the code section of a git blame line.

option.name: --blame-timestamp-format
tip: Format of git blame timestamp in raw git output received by delta.

option.name: --blame-timestamp-output-format
tip: Format string for git blame timestamp output.

option.name: --color-only
tip: Do not alter the input structurally in any way.
But color and highlight hunk lines according to your delta configuration.

option.name: --commit-decoration-style
tip: Style string for the commit hash decoration.

option.name: --commit-regex
tip: Regular expression used to identify the commit line when parsing git output.

option.name: --commit-style
tip: Style string for the commit hash line.

option.name: --config
tip: Load the config file at PATH instead of ~/.gitconfig.

option.name: --dark
tip: Use default colors appropriate for a dark terminal background.

option.name: --default-language
tip: Default language used for syntax highlighting.

option.name: --detect-dark-light
tip: Detect whether or not the terminal is dark or light by querying for its colors.

option.name: --diff-args
tip: Extra arguments to pass to `git diff` when using delta to diff two files.

option.name: --diff-stat-align-width
tip: Width allocated for file paths in a diff stat section.

option.name: --features
tip: Names of delta features to activate (space-separated).

option.name: --file-added-label
tip: Text to display before an added file path.

option.name: --file-copied-label
tip: Text to display before a copied file path.

option.name: --file-decoration-style
tip: Style string for the file decoration.

option.name: --file-modified-label
tip: Text to display before a modified file path.

option.name: --file-removed-label
tip: Text to display before a removed file path.

option.name: --file-renamed-label
tip: Text to display before a renamed file path.

option.name: --file-style
tip: Style string for the file section.

option.name: --file-transformation
tip: Sed-style command transforming file paths for display.

option.name: --generate-completion
tip: Print completion file for the given shell.

option.name: --grep-context-line-style
tip: Style string for non-matching lines of grep output.

option.name: --grep-file-style
tip: Style string for file paths in grep output.

option.name: --grep-header-decoration-style
tip: Style string for the header decoration in grep output.

option.name: --grep-header-file-style
tip: Style string for the file path part of the header in grep output.

option.name: --grep-line-number-style
tip: Style string for line numbers in grep output.

option.name: --grep-match-line-style
tip: Style string for matching lines of grep output.

option.name: --grep-match-word-style
tip: Style string for the matching substrings within a matching line of grep output.

option.name: --grep-separator-symbol
tip: Separator symbol printed after the file path and line number in grep output.

option.name: --hunk-header-decoration-style
tip: Style string for the hunk-header decoration.

option.name: --hunk-header-file-style
tip: Style string for the file path part of the hunk-header.

option.name: --hunk-header-line-number-style
tip: Style string for the line number part of the hunk-header.

option.name: --hunk-label
tip: Text to display before a hunk header.

option.name: --hyperlinks
tip: Render commit hashes, file names, and line numbers as hyperlinks.

option.name: --inline-hint-style
tip: Style string for short inline hint text.

option.name: --keep-plus-minus-markers
tip: Prefix added/removed lines with a +/- character, as git does.

option.name: --light
tip: Use default colors appropriate for a light terminal background.

option.name: --line-numbers
tip: Display line numbers next to the diff.

option.name: --line-numbers-left-format
tip: Format string for the left column of line numbers.

option.name: --line-numbers-left-style
tip: Style string for the left column of line numbers.

option.name: --line-numbers-minus-style
tip: Style string for line numbers in the old (minus) version of the file.

option.name: --line-numbers-plus-style
tip: Style string for line numbers in the new (plus) version of the file.

option.name: --line-numbers-right-format
tip: Format string for the right column of line numbers.

option.name: --line-numbers-right-style
tip: Style string for the right column of line numbers.

option.name: --line-numbers-zero-style
tip: Style string for line numbers in unchanged (zero) lines.

option.name: --list-languages
tip: List supported languages and associated file extensions.

option.name: --map-styles
tip: Map styles encountered in raw input to desired output styles.

option.name: --max-line-distance
tip: Maximum line pair distance parameter in within-line diff algorithm.

option.name: --max-syntax-highlighting-length
tip: Stop syntax highlighting lines after this many characters.

option.name: --merge-conflict-begin-symbol
tip: String marking the beginning of a merge conflict region.

option.name: --merge-conflict-end-symbol
tip: String marking the end of a merge conflict region.

option.name: --merge-conflict-ours-diff-header-decoration-style
tip: Style string for the decoration of the header above the 'ours' merge conflict diff.

option.name: --merge-conflict-ours-diff-header-style
tip: Style string for the header above the 'ours' branch merge conflict diff.

option.name: --merge-conflict-theirs-diff-header-decoration-style
tip: Style string for the decoration of the header above the 'theirs' merge conflict diff.

option.name: --merge-conflict-theirs-diff-header-style
tip: Style string for the header above the 'theirs' branch merge conflict diff.

option.name: --minus-emph-style
tip: Style string for emphasized sections of removed lines.

option.name: --minus-empty-line-marker-style
tip: Style string for removed empty line marker.

option.name: --minus-non-emph-style
tip: Style string for non-emphasized sections of removed lines that have an emphasized section.

option.name: --navigate
tip: Use n to jump forwards and N to jump backwards.

option.name: --navigate-regex
tip: Regular expression defining navigation stop points.

option.name: --no-gitconfig
tip: Do not read any settings from git config.

option.name: --paging
tip: Whether to use a pager when displaying output.

option.name: --parse-ansi
tip: Display ANSI color escape sequences in human-readable form.

option.name: --plus-emph-style
tip: Style string for emphasized sections of added lines.

option.name: --plus-empty-line-marker-style
tip: Style string for added empty line marker.

option.name: --plus-non-emph-style
tip: Style string for non-emphasized sections of added lines that have an emphasized section.

option.name: --raw
tip: Do not alter the input in any way.
This is mainly intended for testing delta.

option.name: --relative-paths
tip: Output all file paths relative to the current directory.

option.name: --right-arrow
tip: Text to display with a changed file path.

option.name: --show-config
tip: Display the active values for all Delta options.

option.name: --show-syntax-themes
tip: Show example diff for available syntax-highlighting themes.

option.name: --show-themes
tip: Show example diff for available delta themes.

option.name: --tabs
tip: The number of spaces to replace tab characters with.

option.name: --true-color
tip: Whether to emit 24-bit (true color) RGB color codes.

option.name: --word-diff-regex
tip: Regular expression defining a 'word' in within-line diff algorithm.

option.name: --wrap-max-lines
tip: How often a line should be wrapped if it does not fit.
